commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=eb0569282176d39357b258059cbb35fbca4d2662)
commands.review_summary:
The PR retains full QMD managers at Gateway startup for configured interval/embed maintenance when boot sync is disabled, fixes collection-root-relative watcher ignores, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +137. Total +160 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main closes the transient startup manager after boot sync, so it cannot keep interval/embed maintenance armed. The exact user-visible symptom has not been demonstrated in a real Gateway run.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The protected maintainer label and unresolved product-level startup contract require explicit human handling rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(memory): keep QMD background refreshes armed
target.body:
## Summary

- keep QMD background refresh managers armed when startup is configured for interval/embed work even if boot sync is disabled
- make memory watch ignores relative to configured collection roots so a root named `build`, `dist`, `vendor`, or `.cache` is not ignored wholesale
- centralize the QMD startup-work predicate and document that `onBoot: false` suppresses only the boot refresh, not interval/embed maintenance startup
- isolate the deadcode pnpm fallback test from CI-managed `PATH` state

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-startup-memory.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts test/scripts/check-deadcode-unused-files.test.ts` (13 tooling + 118 gateway + 125 memory-extension tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.full-core-support-boundary.config.ts` (3229 passed, 15 skipped)
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts src/gateway/server-startup-memory.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts test/scripts/check-deadcode-unused-files.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts src/gateway/server-startup-memory.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-memory.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.ts test/scripts/check-deadcode-unused-files.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`

Broad `pnpm check:changed` was not run locally because this shell has no `pnpm` or `corepack`; PR CI should cover that full lane before merge.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
